case_title: RODOLFO YAMBAO et al VS. ARNULFO ARNOLD ABUAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAMBAO, RODOLFO YAMBAO, YONILLA SERVED JAN-03-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 1-X
